items.title: Alignment research often has to focus on averting concerning behaviors, but I think the p…
items.title_zh: 联盟研究通常必须集中于避免相关行为，但我认为……
items.description: Alignment research often has to focus on averting concerning behaviors, but I think the positive vision for this kind of training is one where we can give models and honest and positive vision for what AI models can be and why. I'm excited…
items.description_zh: 一致性研究通常必须集中于避免相关行为，但我认为这种培训的积极愿景是我们可以提供模型以及诚实和积极的愿景来了解人工智能模型可以是什么以及为什么。我很兴奋……

items.title: HTML is the new markdown.

items.title: A common trend emerging in larger enterprises is token budgeting as a major topic.
items.title_zh: 大型企业中出现的一个共同趋势是象征性预算作为一个主要话题。
items.description: A common trend emerging in larger enterprises is token budgeting as a major topic. As agents can do more and more long running tasks, and thus take vastly more compute, allocation of tokens across teams becomes a very real thing in the ent…
items.description_zh: 大型企业中出现的一个共同趋势是象征性预算作为一个主要话题。随着代理可以执行越来越多的长时间运行的任务，从而需要更多的计算，跨团队分配代币在企业中变得非常现实……

items.title: The more I think about AI agents, the less obvious it is that pricing goes purely consump…
items.title_zh: 我对人工智能代理的思考越多，定价纯粹是消费的这一点就越不明显……
items.description: The more I think about AI agents, the less obvious it is that pricing goes purely consumption-based Token costs matter... but enterprise agents may need identities, roles, auth, budgets, audit logs etc That sounds oddly seat-like? just not…
items.description_zh: 我对人工智能代理的思考越多，就越不明显的是，定价纯粹基于消费 代币成本很重要……但企业代理可能需要身份、角色、身份验证、预算、审计日志等 这听起来很奇怪？只是不……
